hero.subheadline: Deterministic production systems. AI that actually ships.

problem.title: EVERYONE SELLS AI. NOBODY SHIPS IT.
problem.description: Chatbots hallucinate. Dashboards need interpretation. RAG retrieves the wrong docs. The only metric: does it run in production, 24/7, without a human babysitting it?

capabilities.title: AGENTIC WORKFLOW SYSTEMS
capabilities.description: Autonomous systems that plan, act, and adapt. Built for real-world chaos.

capabilities.title: PRIVATE AI PIPELINES
capabilities.description: Secure, modular pipelines for ingestion, reasoning, and action at scale.

capabilities.title: INDUSTRIAL COMPUTER VISION
capabilities.description: Robust CV systems that perform in the real world, not just in benchmarks.

capabilities.title: MULTIMODAL CONVERSATIONAL AI
capabilities.description: Voice, text, image — understood in context. Conversationally useful.

work.title: AI AVATAR INTERFACE
work.description: Multilingual speech-to-speech interaction with expressive avatars for global audiences.

work.title: HYPERSPECTRAL PLATFORM
work.description: Mineral analysis and grading with hyperspectral imaging and ML models.

work.title: INVESTIGATION ASSISTANT
work.description: Secure evidence workflows, semantic search, and automated case summaries.

process.title: HOW WE WORK
process.description: A clear, repeatable process that turns complex problems into production systems.

steps.title: DISCOVER
steps.description: We uncover the right problems to solve.

steps.title: LAUNCH
steps.description: We ship, iterate, and drive growth.

process.cta: NEED THE FIRST VERSION WORTH SHIPPING?

contact.tagline: BUILT TO RUN. NOT BUILT TO PITCH.
